calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Kuehne + Nagel Inc. To Respond, Without Objection, To Plaintiff?S First Set Of Form Employment Interrogatories; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Russell F. Wolpert
Off Calendar May-12-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - Plaintiff Jean-Pierre Alder's Motion To Compel Defendant Kuehne + Nagel Inc. To Respond, Without Objection, To Plaintiff's First Set Of Form Employment Interrogatories is OFF CALENDAR.

On 4/21/2026, the court entered an order compelling Plaintiff to submit his claims to arbitration and staying this action pending the outcome of arbitration. The stay still in place, the motion is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Kuehne + Nagel Inc. To Respond, Without Objection, To Plaintiff?S First Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Russell F. Wolpe

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - Plaintiff Jean-Pierre Alder's Motion To Compel Defendant Kuehne + Nagel Inc. To Respond, Without Objection, To Plaintiff's First Set Of Requests for Production of Documents is OFF CALENDAR.

On 4/21/2026, the court entered an order compelling Plaintiff to submit his claims to arbitration and staying this action pending the outcome of arbitration. The stay still in place, the motion is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - PLAINTIFF JEAN-PIERRE ALDER's Motion To Compel Defendant Kuehne + Nagel Inc. To Respond, Without Objection, To Plaintiff?S First Set Of Form Employment Interrogatories.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT KUEHNE + NAGEL INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration

Appearances (by Zoom):
Daniel Contreras, Esq. Ellis George LLP. 310-274-7100 for Plaintiff.
Nicole Perkin, Esq. Cozen O'Connor 310-943-48154 for Defendant.

ARGUED.
The Court reads aloud the notice to contest from Mr. Contreras. Counsel confirms. The Court comments; not a unilateral decision to arbitrate; state law states each party to bear own fees, authority held in CA and not New York, Ca law applies.
Ms. Perkin submits to the TR.
Mr. Contreras presents arguments; not factually correct, creating imbalance, cites case authority. confidentiality and non-solicitation provision.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Defendant Kuehne + Nagel Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Counsel to drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox by Monday at the latest.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/REQ)
